docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, WEIHONG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $746.09 FILED BY TAN, WEIHONG AS TO DEFENDANT MAR, JEFFERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, WEIHONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAR, JEFFERY THE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE CAUSED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAR, JEFFERY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER TOM LAM PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
